title_en: Harper's Corner Takes Schuylerville in Spa Opener
description: Good fortune was in order on this tumultuous Friday at Saratoga Race Course.

description: In this week's On Racing, Hall of Fame jockey Gary Stevens discusses prior injuries as he gets set to represent pal Mike Smith at the upcoming Del Mar meet.

title_en: Stakes Preview: Belmont Derby & Belmont Oaks
description: Megan Burgess looks forward to the Belmont Derby & Belmont Oaks at Saratoga this weekend.

description: Hot Rod Honey becomes the initial stakes winner for Ocala Stud's first-crop sire Roadster with a striking 4 1/4-length victory in the $96,500 Sharp Susan Stakes July 3 at Gulfstream Park.

description: Woodbine Entertainment, with approval from the Alcohol Gaming Commission of Ontario and consultation from the Horsemen's Benevolent and Protective Association, has added a rescheduled race date for July 6 at Woodbine.

title_en: Deep Field Gelding Tops Hong Kong International Sale
description: A vibrant Hong Kong International Sale July 3 saw 16 horses sold at Sha Tin, with a Deep Field gelding topping the sale at HK$9.2 million for purchaser Alan Hu. A second son of the four-time Hong Kong champion sire nets HK$6.6 million.

title_en: Former Santa Anita Track Superintendent Ron Moore Dies
description: Former Santa Anita Park track superintendent Ron Moore dies at age 80 from complications of a recent stroke.

title_en: Stroud Treasuring Experience as Horse Owner
description: Will Stroud has made great strides as a horse owner, and he will be hoping to secure a grade 1 double July 4 at Saratoga with Title Role in the $750,000 Belmont Derby (G1T) and Kensington Lane in the $600,000 Belmont Oaks (G1T).

description: Colonial Downs and Monmouth Park cancel racing July 4 because of sweltering heat.

description: Colonial Downs is the latest track to cancel racing July 3 because of extreme summer heat gripping much of the country. The Virginia track has rescheduled its Friday card, moving it in its entirety as drawn to July 6.

description: Woodbine announced July 2 that racing July 3 has been canceled because of ongoing underground infrastructure repairs. Contractors remain on-site working to resolve the issue.

description: Maryland's Board of Public Works approves the Maryland Stadium Authority's request to purchase Laurel Park to serve as the training center. This comes after the Maryland Stadium Authority supported the deal in April.

description: Woodbine Entertainment announced July 1 live Thoroughbred racing for July 2 at Woodbine has been cancelled due to a sewer line leak at the all-weather main track.
